chapter_title.en: Fulfilling rights of the ungrateful as idolatry

text: ١٦٤. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): مَنْ قَضَى حَقَّ مَنْ لَا يَقْضِي حَقَّهُ فَقَدْ عَبَدَهُ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 164. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: He who fulfils the right of a man who does not fulfil his right, (is as though he) worships him.
